items.title: Wizards clinch NBA’s worst record with loss to Heat
items.blurb: Wizards clinch NBA’s worst record with loss to Heat — The Washington Wizards clinched the worst record in the NBA on Friday night with a 140-117 loss to the Miami Heat.

items.title: NBA Highlights: Heat 140, Wizards 117
items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Heat 140, Wizards 117 — Bam Adebayo had a 20-point, 11-rebound double-double and Pelle Larsson added 24 points off the bench to help the Miami Heat beat the Washington Wizards 140-117.

items.title: Heat Waiving Terry Rozier
items.blurb: Heat Waiving Terry Rozier — The Miami Heat are waiving guard Terry Rozier on Friday. Rozier has been out all season while be investigated for his involvement in a gambling scandal. Rozier's contract is fully guaranteed for $26.6 million. That amount will go on Miami's books as dead money. After having his salary initially held in escrow, Rozier has been paid on his regular pay schedule by the Heat

items.title: Lakers Waive Kobe Bufkin
items.blurb: Lakers Waive Kobe Bufkin — The Los Angeles Lakers have waived guard Kobe Bufkin from his two-year deal. The Lakers are opening a roster spot ahead of the playoffs to evaluate another signing. Bufkin appeared in 16 games with the Lakers, averaging 2.9 points in 7.5 minutes. Bufkin was the 15th overall pick in the 2023 draft out of Michigan.

items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Knicks 112, Raptors 95 — Jalen Brunson led the way with 29 points and Karl-Anthony Towns had a 22-point, 10-rebound double-double to help the New York Knicks beat the Toronto Raptors 112-95.

items.title: Raptors’ Murray-Boyles, Quickley out vs. Knicks
items.blurb: Raptors’ Murray-Boyles, Quickley out vs. Knicks — Guard Immanuel Quickley and forward Collin Murray-Boyles are listed as out for the showdown against the New York Knicks, the team announced before Friday’s game.

items.title: Dink Pate Commits To Providence
items.blurb: Dink Pate Commits To Providence — Dink Pate of the G League's Westchester Knicks committed to Providence on Thursday, his agent told ESPN. Pate was a top-30 recruit in the 2023 class before opting to play for the G League Ignite. Pate averaged 16.8 points and 6.7 rebounds at Westchester last season. Providence also secured a commitment from transfer Miles Byrd, who was the Mountain West Defensive

items.title: NBA Highlights: Jazz 147, Grizzlies 101
items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Jazz 147, Grizzlies 101 — Seven players scored in double figures, led by Ben Hinson’s 30 points, while Bez Mbeng and John Konchar each recorded triple-doubles off the bench as the Utah Jazz trounced the Memphis Grizzlies 147–101.

items.title: Lucas Williamson, Grizzlies Sign 2nd 10-Day Contract
items.blurb: Lucas Williamson, Grizzlies Sign 2nd 10-Day Contract — The Memphis Grizzlies have signed wing Lucas Williamson to a second 10-Day contract. Williamson (6-4, 205) has appeared in five games (one start) and has averaged 9.0 points, 3.8 rebounds and 2.4 assists in 28.2 minutes since signing his first 10-Day contract on March 31. The 27-year-old has averaged 16.5 points in his last two games. Williams

items.title: Alex Sarr Likely Out For Season With Toe Injury
items.blurb: Alex Sarr Likely Out For Season With Toe Injury — Washington Wizards forward Alex Sarr is likely to miss the team's final three games of the season with a toe injury, head coach Brian Keefe said on Thursday.
